items: Welcome by the School Board President

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item pulled from agenda: Staff recognition was added after item 5 (Oral Communication). No other items were pulled or reordered.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: So we are on to item six, the bond program consent items to approve. Mrs. Dennis so moved. Second. Cecilia. Okay, Cecilia was second. And a roll call vote, please.
